title: Agent Role Generator
description: Scaffold a new agent role across all cross-cutting concerns

shape.description: Role shape determines default bounds and prompt template

x-prompt.message: Which shape best describes this role?

items.label: reviewer - read-only, reviews PR diffs (network=allowlist, write=none)
patcher - writes fix commits to PR branch (network=allowlist, write=branch)
analyst - investigates telemetry, writes report (network=allowlist, write=worktree)
